commands.review_summary:
The PR adds `phone_number` resolution to `groups requests list` output and adds command registration tests for group request subcommands.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main serializes `[]types.GroupParticipantRequest`, while the PR serializes a new struct tagged with different JSON keys; I did not run the PR because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Needs human/contributor follow-up for JSON compatibility and real behavior proof; current main still lacks the requested `phone_number` output, so this is not a cleanup close.

target.title: feat(groups): resolve LID to phone number in requests list output
target.body:
## Summary

- `groups requests list` previously returned opaque `@lid` JIDs; this PR adds a
  `phone_number` field by calling the already-available `ResolveLIDToPN` from the
  `WAClient` interface.
- **JSON output**: new `phone_number` key (omitted when unresolved → backward-compatible).
- **Table output**: adds a phone column between JID and timestamp.

## Why

Callers that maintain a phone-number-based allowlist (e.g. an alumni roster) cannot
correlate pending join requests against the list without a separate LID-to-phone
resolution step. With this change, the resolved number is included directly in the
output when it is available in the local contact store.

## Test plan

- [x] `go test ./cmd/wacli/ -run TestGroupsRequests` passes (two new tests)
- [x] Full suite (`go test ./...`) passes — all 13 packages green
- [x] Live test against a real group with approval-required mode: 23/25 entries
  returned with resolved `phone_number`, 2 unresolved (not in local contact store)
target.author: cielecki
